calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order And Judgment To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attorney BARRY TAGAWA, ESQ. of the Law Office of Barry Tagawa, Tel No. 415-951-8600 appearing as a Plaintiff in pro per;
Defendant GARY P. MCKAE, Tel No. 650-743-7249 appearing in pro per;
Defendant CYNTHIA MCKAE, Tel No. 650-362-3467 appearing in pro per.

RULING - The Court court determines that defendants did not properly notify the Court and opposing counsel of their intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling. Plaintiff objects to argument by defendants at hearing. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BARRY TAGAWA'S Motion For Order And Judgment To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prior to the Court signing Plaintiff's proposed judgment, Plaintiff must prepare and submit a proposed order after hearing to the Court for the Court's signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
